### 1 -Sends SMS to remind rep to call in 5 min
### 2- (Optional delay step)
### 3- Triggers RetellAI to place an automated call to the lead

## 💡 Requires phone numbers to be formatted in E.164

nodes.name: Sticky Note1

parameters.content:
# ✅ General Workflow Explanation
##  This workflow automates outbound and inbound lead calls with RetellAI, Google Sheets, OpenAI, and Gmail. It handles:

Scheduling and reminding outbound qualification calls
Handling inbound appointment calls
Automatically updating records and sending summaries post-call

## 👉 Dependencies:

Active RetellAI API key
Google Sheet set up with lead data
Gmail API credentials configured

parameters.content:
# ✅ General Workflow Explanation
##  This workflow automates outbound and inbound lead calls with RetellAI, Google Sheets, OpenAI, and Gmail. It handles:

Scheduling and reminding outbound qualification calls
Handling inbound appointment calls
Automatically updating records and sending summaries post-call

## 👉 Dependencies:

Active RetellAI API key
Google Sheet set up with lead data
Gmail API credentials configured

# Post-call workflow
## Triggers when a new lead is added in Google Sheets:

### 1 -Sends SMS to remind rep to call in 5 min
### 2- (Optional delay step)
### 3- Triggers RetellAI to place an automated call to the lead

## 💡 Requires phone numbers to be formatted in E.164

nodes.name: Update lead record in Google Sheets

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: google Sheets Trigger  O Auth2  A P I details
google Sheets  O Auth2  A P I details
open Ai  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "Detect new lead in Google Sheets".
Locate the webhook node named "Receive inbound call from RetellAI (webhook)".
Copy the Test Webhook URL provided by n8n.
Configure your source application (e.g. Stripe, Typeform) to send event payloads to this URL.
Locate the webhook node named "Send response to inbound webhook call".
Copy the Test Webhook URL provided by n8n.
Configure your source application (e.g. Stripe, Typeform) to send event payloads to this URL.
Locate the webhook node named "Receive post-call data from RetellAI (webhook)".
Copy the Test Webhook URL provided by n8n.
Configure your source application (e.g. Stripe, Typeform) to send event payloads to this URL.
Open the "Sticky Note" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note4" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note2" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Send SMS reminder to call lead in 5 minutes" node (n8n-nodes-base.twilio) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Wait 5 minutes before making call" node (n8n-nodes-base.wait) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Call new lead using RetellAI" node (n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Check if phone number exists in Google Sheets" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Filter for analyzed calls only" node (n8n-nodes-base.filter) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Check if call was outbound" node (n8n-nodes-base.if) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Update lead record in Google Sheets" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Send call summary email" node (n8n-nodes-base.gmail) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Generate call summary with OpenAI" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Send confirmation email to lead" node (n8n-nodes-base.gmail) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note1" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
No global variables node (Set node) is present. If you need dynamic constants, add a Set node after the trigger.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Incoming triggers will qualified/formatted, new rows will be written to Google Sheets, and email replies or alerts will be sent automatically.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
